title: viola montana var. stagnina
intro: Viola montana var. stagnina, also known as the alpine pansy or mountain violet, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the viola genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola montana var. stagnina include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and provide relief from symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
